services.name: Cardiac Checkup Package
services.prep: 3-hour fasting before ECG and Stress Test
services.includes: ECG, Echocardiogram, Lipid Profile, Blood Sugar, HbA1c, Kidney Function, Cardiologist consultation

services.name: Brain MRI
services.prep: No fasting required. Remove all metal objects.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: Spine MRI
services.prep: No fasting required. Wear comfortable clothing.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: CT Head
services.prep: No special preparation required.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: CT Chest
services.prep: No fasting. Contrast dye may be administered — inform technician of allergies.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: CT Abdomen with Contrast
services.prep: Drink 500 ml contrast water 1 hour before scan. 4-hour fasting for IV contrast.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: PET CT Scan
services.prep: 6-hour fasting required. No strenuous exercise 24 hours before.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: Ultrasound Abdomen
services.prep: 4-hour fasting required. Drink 1 litre of water 1 hour before and do not urinate.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
services.prep: No fasting required.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Blood Sugar Fasting
services.prep: 8 to 10 hours fasting required. Water allowed.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: HbA1c Test
services.prep: No fasting required. Can be done at any time.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Thyroid Profile (T3, T4, TSH)
services.prep: No fasting required. Inform technician if you take thyroid medication.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Lipid Profile
services.prep: 10 to 12 hours fasting required. Avoid alcohol 24 hours before.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Liver Function Test (LFT)
services.prep: 8 to 10 hours fasting required. Avoid alcohol 24 hours before.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Kidney Function Test (KFT / RFT)
services.prep: No fasting required. Stay well hydrated.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Vitamin D Test
services.prep: No fasting required.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Vitamin B12 Test
services.prep: No fasting required.
services.location: Lab, Ground Floor, Lab Wing A

services.name: Stress Test (TMT - Treadmill Test)
services.prep: 3-hour fasting. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Bring a companion.
services.location: Cardiology OPD, Block A, 1st Floor

services.name: Echocardiogram (ECHO)
services.prep: No fasting or special preparation required.
services.location: Cardiology OPD, Block A, 1st Floor

services.name: Mammogram
services.prep: Do not apply deodorant or talc on the day of the test. Wear a two-piece outfit.
services.location: Radiology, Ground Floor, Lab Wing B

services.name: Physiotherapy Session
services.prep: Wear loose comfortable clothing. Bring previous physiotherapy records if any.
services.location: Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation, 2nd Floor, Block D

services.name: Dialysis Session
services.prep: Bring previous dialysis records. Do not eat heavily before session.
services.location: Dialysis Centre, 1st Floor, Block A

health_packages.name: Silver Wellness Package
health_packages.includes: Complete Blood Count, Blood Sugar Fasting, Thyroid Profile, Lipid Profile, Urine Routine, Kidney Function Test, ECG, Chest X-Ray, General Physician consultation
health_packages.prep: 10-hour overnight fasting required. Visit the lab before 9 AM.

health_packages.name: Gold Comprehensive Package
health_packages.includes: All Silver Package tests plus Liver Function Test, Vitamin D, Vitamin B12, HbA1c, Ultrasound Abdomen, Eye check, Dental check, Specialist consultation
health_packages.prep: 10-hour overnight fasting required. Visit the lab before 9 AM.

health_packages.name: Executive Full Body Package
health_packages.includes: All Gold Package tests plus Pulmonary Function Test, Stress Test (TMT), Echocardiogram, Full Body MRI Screening, Bone Density Scan, Ophthalmology exam, detailed counselling session
health_packages.prep: Overnight fasting. Appointment required. Takes a full day.

health_packages.name: Cardiac Screening Package
health_packages.target: Those with family history of heart disease or hypertension
health_packages.includes: ECG, Echocardiogram, Stress Test (TMT), Lipid Profile, Blood Sugar, HbA1c, Kidney Function, Cardiologist consultation
health_packages.prep: 3-hour fasting. Wear comfortable shoes for treadmill test.

health_packages.name: Women's Wellness Package
health_packages.includes: Gynecologist consultation, Pap Smear, Mammogram, Complete Blood Count, Thyroid Profile, Vitamin D, Vitamin B12, Urine Routine, Blood Sugar, Bone Density Check
health_packages.prep: Schedule during non-menstrual days for Pap Smear. 8-hour fasting for blood tests.

room_types.name: Semi-Private Room
room_types.description: Shared with one other patient, nursing call support, meals included

room_types.description: Open ward with standard nursing care, meals included

insurance.tpa_desk_location: Ground Floor, near main billing counter
insurance.tpa_desk_hours: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM weekdays, 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM Saturday

emergency.location: Ground Floor, Block A main gate entrance, 24x7
emergency.instruction: Our Emergency and Trauma Centre is open 24x7. No prior registration needed. Connecting you to the emergency desk right away.

ground_floor_kiosk.location: Ground Floor, near OPD waiting area

amenities.atm: SBI ATM at Ground Floor lobby, accessible 24x7
amenities.wifi: Free Wi-Fi throughout hospital. Network: InDiiServe-Guest. Login with mobile OTP.
amenities.wheelchair: Free wheelchair and porter service at all entrances
amenities.prayer_room: Ground Floor near main entrance, open 24x7

questions: Which insurance companies do you support?
faq.answer: Yes, we are empanelled with over 30 insurance companies including Star Health, HDFC Ergo, ICICI Lombard, Bajaj Allianz, Max Bupa, New India Assurance, and many more. Cashless treatment is available. Our TPA cashless desk is on the Ground Floor near the main billing counter. Please carry your health card and a photo ID.

Multi-level parking is available at Basement B1 and B2. Car parking is Rs. 30 per hour and two-wheelers are Rs. 10 per hour. The first 2 hours are free with a valid OPD token. For admitted patients' visitors, a flat rate of Rs. 100 per day is applicable.

Our main pharmacy is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. It is located on the Ground Floor near the main exit. We also have an in-patient pharmacy on the 3rd Floor. Home delivery is available within Bengaluru.

questions: ICU mein kab mil sakte hain?
When can I visit the patient in ICU?
faq.answer: ICU visiting hours are from 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM daily. Only one visitor is allowed at a time with a valid ICU visitor pass, available at the 4th Floor ICU Reception.

questions: What are general ward visiting hours?
Ward mein milne ka time kya hai?
When can family visit admitted patient?
faq.answer: General ward visiting hours are from 4:00 PM to 7:00 PM daily. A maximum of two visitors per patient are allowed. Children below 12 years are not permitted inside the ward.

questions: NICU mein kab mil sakte hain?
Can parents visit baby in NICU?
Can I see my newborn in NICU?
faq.answer: Parents can visit their baby in the NICU from 9:00 AM to 9:30 AM and 6:00 PM to 6:30 PM daily. Only biological parents are allowed with a valid NICU visitor band issued at the 3rd Floor NICU reception. Photographs and mobile phones are not permitted inside.

questions: Night mein mil sakte hain kya?
faq.answer: Visiting hours end at 7:00 PM. After that, only one attendant per patient is allowed to remain in the ward overnight. The attendant must have a valid overnight pass issued by the nursing station. ICU patients are not allowed any overnight attendants.

questions: What certifications does the hospital have?
faq.answer: Yes, InDiiServe Multi-Specialty Hospital is NABH accredited, which means we meet the highest national standards for patient safety, quality of care, and clinical governance. Our facility is also ISO 9001 certified.

questions: What health packages do you offer?
Full body checkup kahan hota hai?
Do you have health checkup packages?
What is the cost of a full body checkup?
faq.answer: We offer 5 health checkup packages: Silver Wellness at Rs. 2,200 for ages 18 to 40; Gold Comprehensive at Rs. 4,500 for ages 40 to 60; Executive Full Body at Rs. 7,500 for professionals; Cardiac Screening at Rs. 3,200; and Women's Wellness at Rs. 3,800. Shall I book one for you?

questions: How do I get my reports?
Where do I collect lab reports?
faq.answer: Once your reports are ready, you will receive an SMS with a download link. Hard copies can be collected from the Lab Report Counter on the Ground Floor, Lab Wing A, using your Reference ID. You can also access reports on our patient portal.

questions: Do I need to fast before blood test?
Blood test se pehle kuch khana chahiye?
Can I eat before blood test?
faq.answer: It depends on the test. Fasting for 8 to 12 hours is required for Blood Sugar, Lipid Profile, and Liver Function tests. Thyroid, Vitamin D, HbA1c, and CBC tests do not require fasting. Please let me know the specific test for more details.

questions: Kya UPI se payment ho sakti hai?
faq.answer: We accept all payment modes including UPI, debit and credit cards, net banking, cash, and insurance cashless billing. The billing counter is on the Ground Floor near the main entrance. EMI is available for bills above Rs. 50,000.

Our multi-cuisine food court is on the 5th Floor, Block B, open from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM. There is also a kiosk on the Ground Floor near the OPD waiting area for quick bites and hot beverages from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM.
Wheelchair and porter services are available free of charge at all entrances. Please let any staff member know or approach the main reception, and we will arrange assistance immediately.
Our 24x7 ambulance service is available. Call plus 91 80 4000 9000 or dial the national emergency number 1066. Our ambulance is equipped with Advanced Life Support systems.

questions: Urgent case kahan le ke jaayein?
faq.answer: Our Emergency and Trauma Centre is at the Ground Floor, Block A main gate entrance, open 24 hours with no prior registration needed. For critical emergencies, dial 1066.

Cardiology is on the 1st Floor, Block A. Neurology is on the 4th Floor, Neuro Wing. Orthopedics is on the 2nd Floor, Block B. Gynecology is on the 4th Floor, Block C. Endocrinology and Diabetes Clinic is on the Ground Floor, Block A. Shall I book an appointment for you?

questions: Can I get a second opinion?
Is there a second opinion service?
Dusre doctor se opinion lena hai
faq.answer: Yes, our dedicated Second Opinion Clinic runs every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Prior appointment is required. Please bring all previous medical records and reports. Shall I book a slot?
